task_title: Post Work Bundle Admission Ring V0.3 - Standard Task Completion Closure Route

language_and_encoding_policy.taskpack_internal_files: All taskpack internal files are ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM ASCII-safe text only.
language_and_encoding_policy.canonical_repo_artifacts: Canonical machine-readable repo artifacts must be ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM unless an explicit OFFICIO routed owner-language exception is written.
language_and_encoding_policy.owner_facing_russian_runtime_output: Owner-facing live and final runtime output must be Russian after OFFICIO_AGENTIS role entry and must be routed through OFFICIO authority.
language_and_encoding_policy.cyrillic_in_taskpack: Forbidden in taskpack internal files. Owner Russian is described in ENGLISH and routed through OFFICIO.
language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: OFFICIO_AGENTIS may require Russian owner-facing summaries after role entry; machine artifacts remain ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM.

source_context.v0_2_result_summary: Schema-backed checker, closure updater, and repair loop were created. V0.3 must integrate them into standard task completion closure.

hard_boundaries: Do not claim full semantic truth.
Do not claim full Custodes or Throne authority.
Do not use Ancient Empire as runtime root.
Do not create fake green PASS.
Do not finish without commit, push, git clean proof, and origin/master equality proof.

enhanced_ghost_evolve.meaning: Servitor must teach internal organs through contracts, schemas, templates, validators, receipts, checkers, and next-route cards. New knowledge must be placed into organ-owned artifacts, not only final summaries.
